title: potentilla cinerea subsp. arenaria
intro: Potentilla cinerea subsp. arenaria, also known as coastal potentilla or silver cinquefoil, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The roots and leaves of Potentilla cinerea subsp. arenaria can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
